titleStmt.title: SII 24.387: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 387. (A.R. No. 32 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL, TIERS, EAST END

summary.p: Registers an investment of money from the interest on which certain offerings are provided for god Raṅganātha while he halts at the garden of Narasiṅgarāyar Śrīraṅgarāja-Nayinār of Māṭhala-gōtra on the fourth day during the festival in the month of Paṅguni. A share of the offerings is allotted to the said Nayinār of the garden. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1450, [Sa]rvadhārin, Mina, śu[9], Thursday, Pushya correspond to A.D. 1529, March 18, Thursday, ·56, f.d.n. ·15. At the end of the record the perpetual devotion (sadāsēvai) of Timmarasa is recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . sūnu śrīnṛ ḍenagaridāsāṅaha � nātaḥ śrīraṅgeśvaranāma ko śrabhṛtyavargga bha kha phālgunam � pteca dine raṅgeśasya cakāra yā vanisvārāmaya stiśrī śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 Itaṉmel cellā rvadhā sarattu mīnanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu navamiyum guru[ vāramum pe] ṟṟa pūṣyanakṣatrattu nāḷ tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati mā lagotrattu Āśvalāyana sūtrattu tiruppatiśrī rāla tiruna sar naraciṅkarāyar śrīraṅgarājāṉayiṉār tiruttoppu paṅkuṉit tiruṉāḷ nālāntiruṉāḷ Eḻuntaruḷiṉāl Amutupaṭi cāttu ttaṉ Ilaiyamutu
Aṭaikkāyamutum Aṟukalam pori Amutum muṉṉūṟu Atirasamum muṉṉūṟu vaṭaiyum muṉṉūṟu sukhiyanum vaṭai veccamutu Aṉpatu taḷikaiyum Iḷaniramutum Amutu ceyyumpaṭikku Inta nayiṉārp poliyūṭṭākak kovil paṇṭārattile ṉāṟ celuttiṉapaṭiyāle Intappoṉ ṉil vṛddhiyile varuṣam(n) toṟum perumāḷ Intat tiruttoppukku Eḻuntaruḷi ciṟappu Amutu ceytaruḷi candrādityavaraiyum Intat tiruttopput tiruṉāḷk koṇṭaruḷak kaṭavarākavum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu ṉālattoṉṟu Inta nayiṉār peṟakkaṭavarākavum śubhamasvu . timyaracaṉ catākacarvai
Digital edition of SII 24.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
